subcodes.first_line: O Lord! These yearning ones are bewildered by Thy countenance and wandering in Thy path, turning toward Thee in ardent love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار این مشتاقان آشفتهٴ روی تواند و سرگشتهٴ کوی تو و متوجّه بسوی تو و عاشقان
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @love of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God
